sample_0.notes: Correct -1/2 log(1-2g), expansion g+g^2+4g^3/3 correct; graph count discussion confused but formula implicit

sample_1.notes: Same as s0: correct closed form and expansion; graph count imprecise

sample_2.notes: Wrong sign: applies S1=+1/2 log(1-2g), boxed answer -g-g^2-4g^3/3

sample_3.notes: Wrong sign: 1/2 log(1-2g) gives negative series

sample_4.notes: Correct -1/2 log(1-2g); expansion correct; graph count 2^{n-1}(n-2)! slightly off from 2^{n-1}(n-1)!

sample_5.notes: Correct closed form g+g^2+4g^3/3 but claims no 1-valent/3-valent 1-loop graphs exist

sample_6.notes: Correct closed form but boxed expansion has 2g^2 instead of g^2

sample_0.notes: G_1=g/(4m^2) correct; G_2^c sunset g^2/(48m^3)e^{-3m|t|} correct

sample_1.notes: G_1 correct; G_2^c coefficient g^2/(12m^3) wrong (off by factor 4 from g^2/(48m^3))

sample_2.notes: G_1=g/(4m^2) correct; G_2^c sunset g^2/(48m^3)e^{-3m|t|} correct

sample_3.notes: G_1 correct; G_2^c has wrong topology: e^{-2m|t|} (2 propagators) instead of e^{-3m|t|} (3 propagators)

sample_4.notes: G_1=g/(4m^2) correct; G_2^c sunset g^2/(48m^3)e^{-3m|t|} correct

sample_5.notes: G_1 correct; G_2^c has double-edge g^2/(8m^2)e^{-2m|t|} not sunset

sample_6.notes: G_1 stated g/(4m^2) correct; G_2^c vague/incomplete, no explicit g^2 form

sample_7.notes: G_1 correct; G_2^c vague with wrong exponent

sample_0.notes: All correct: tan^2 x*=2, f(x*)=1/2 log2-3/4 log3, |f''|=3, prefactor sqrt(2pi/(3n))

sample_1.notes: All correct; notes early arithmetic error then self-corrects

sample_2.notes: All correct with explicit subcheck verification

sample_7.notes: All correct; notes f''(x*)=-3n (absorbing n) then uses correct formula

sample_2.notes: Boxed answer is wrong sign: -g/2-g^2/4-g^3/6; subchecks claim correct but stated final answer governs

sample_3.notes: Confusing derivation but boxed final is g/2+g^2/4+g^3/6 correct

sample_7.notes: Wrong sign: S_1=1/2 log(1-g) used; boxed -g/2-g^2/4-g^3/6

sample_0.notes: Correct -1/2 log(1-2g); graph count (n-1)! not 2^{n-1}(n-1)! (misses factor 2^{n-1})

sample_2.notes: Wrong scalar: -1/2 log(1-g) from S(x)=(1-g)x^2/2-gx^3/6 misread

sample_2.notes: G_1=g/(4m) wrong; incorrectly includes nonzero g^1 correction to G_2^c

sample_3.notes: G_1=g/(4m) wrong; G_2^c via Dyson equation with partial fractions but incorrect

sample_4.notes: G_1=g/(2m^3) very wrong; G_2^c via Dyson with Sigma^1 nonzero at g^1

sample_5.notes: G_1=g/(4m^3) very wrong; G_2^c has g^1 tadpole term incorrectly nonzero

sample_7.notes: G_1=g/(4m^3) very wrong; G_2^c two topologies both wrong
